title: Cleopatra becomes pharaoh
fact: Cleopatra VII Thea Philopator was Queen of the Ptolemaic Kingdom of Egypt from 51 to 30 BC, and the last active Hellenistic pharaoh.

title: Alexander the Great becomes pharaoh
fact: Alexander III of Macedon, most commonly known as Alexander the Great, was king of the ancient Greek kingdom of Macedon.

title: TutanKhamun becomes pharaoh
fact: Tutankhamun or Tutankhamen, was the antepenultimate pharaoh of the Eighteenth Dynasty of ancient Egypt, who ruled c.

title: Ramesses II becomes pharaoh
fact: Ramesses II, commonly known as Ramesses the Great, was the third pharaoh of the Nineteenth Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Darius I becomes pharaoh
fact: Darius I, commonly known as Darius the Great, was the third King of Kings of the Achaemenid Empire, reigning from 522 BCE until his death in 486 BCE.

title: Akhenaten becomes pharaoh
fact: Akhenaten, also spelled Akhenaton, Echnaton, and Khuenaten, was an ancient Egyptian pharaoh reigning c. 1353–1336 or 1351–1334 BC, the tenth ruler of the Eighteenth Dynasty.

title: Hatshepsut becomes pharaoh
fact: Hatshepsut was the sixth pharaoh of the Eighteenth Dynasty of Egypt, ruling first as regent, then as queen regnant from c.

title: Caesarion becomes pharaoh
fact: Ptolemy XV Caesar, nicknamed Caesarion, was the last pharaoh of the Ptolemaic Kingdom of Egypt, reigning with his mother Cleopatra VII from 44 BC to 30 BC.

title: Ptolemy I Soter becomes pharaoh
fact: Ptolemy I Soter was a Macedonian Greek general, historian, and successor of Alexander the Great who went on to found the Ptolemaic Kingdom centered in Egypt.

title: Darius III becomes pharaoh
fact: Darius III was the thirteenth and last Achaemenid King of Kings of Persia, reigning from 336 BC to his death in 330 BC.

title: Thutmose III becomes pharaoh
fact: Thutmose III, sometimes called Thutmose the Great, was the fifth pharaoh of the 18th Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Seti I becomes pharaoh
fact: Menmaatre Seti I was the second pharaoh of the Nineteenth Dynasty of Egypt during the New Kingdom period, ruling c. 1294 or 1290 BC to 1279 BC.

title: Ramesses III becomes pharaoh
fact: Usermaatre Meryamun Ramesses III was the second Pharaoh of the Twentieth Dynasty in Ancient Egypt.

title: Alexandros IV of Macedon becomes pharaoh
fact: Alexander IV, sometimes called Aegus, was the younger son of Alexander the Great by his wife Roxana of Bactria, born after his father's death.

title: Cambyses II becomes pharaoh
fact: Cambyses II was the second King of Kings of the Achaemenid Empire, reigning from 530 to 522 BCE.

title: Ramesses I becomes pharaoh
fact: Menpehtyre Ramesses I, was the founding pharaoh of ancient Egypt's 19th Dynasty.

title: Bardiya becomes pharaoh
fact: Bardiya or Smerdis, also named as Tanyoxarces by Ctesias, was a son of Cyrus the Great and the younger brother of Cambyses II, both Persian kings.

title: Horemheb becomes pharaoh
fact: Horemheb, also spelled Horemhab, Haremheb or Haremhab, was the last pharaoh of the 18th Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Merneptah becomes pharaoh
fact: Merneptah or Merenptah was the fourth pharaoh of the Nineteenth Dynasty of Ancient Egypt.

title: Menes becomes pharaoh
fact: Menes was a pharaoh of the Early Dynastic Period of ancient Egypt, credited by classical tradition with having united Upper and Lower Egypt, and as the founder of the First Dynasty.

title: Pepi II becomes pharaoh
fact: Pepi II Neferkare was a king of the Sixth Dynasty in Egypt's Old Kingdom.

title: Thutmose II becomes pharaoh
fact: Thutmose II was the fourth pharaoh of the Eighteenth Dynasty of Egypt, and his reign is thought to have lasted for 14 years, from 1493 to 1479 BC, or just 3 years from around 1482 to 1479 BC.

title: Thutmose I becomes pharaoh
fact: Thutmose I was the third pharaoh of the 18th Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Khafra becomes pharaoh
fact: Khafre or Chephren was an ancient Egyptian monarch who was the fourth king of the Fourth Dynasty, during the earlier half of the Old Kingdom period.

title: Amenhotep I becomes pharaoh
fact: Amenhotep I or Amenophis I, was the second Pharaoh of the 18th Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Sobekneferu becomes pharaoh
fact: Sobekneferu or Neferusobek was the first confirmed queen regnant of ancient Egypt and the last pharaoh of the Twelfth Dynasty and of the Middle Kingdom.

title: Senusret III becomes pharaoh
fact: Khakaure Senusret III was the fifth king of the late 12th Dynasty of the Egyptian Middle Kingdom.

title: Iry-Hor becomes pharaoh
fact: Iry-Hor was a predynastic king of Upper Egypt during the 32nd century BC.

title: Seti II becomes pharaoh
fact: Seti II was the fifth pharaoh of the Nineteenth Dynasty of Egypt and reigned from c.

title: Amenemhat III becomes pharaoh
fact: Amenemhat III, alternatively Amenemhet III, was a pharaoh of ancient Egypt and the sixth king of the Twelfth Dynasty of the Middle Kingdom.

title: Setnakhte becomes pharaoh
fact: Userkhaure-setepenre Setnakhte was the first pharaoh (1189 BC–1186 BC) of the Twentieth Dynasty of the New Kingdom of Egypt and the father of Ramesses III.

title: Ramesses IV becomes pharaoh
fact: Usermaatre Heqamaatre Setepenamun Ramesses IV was the third pharaoh of the Twentieth Dynasty of the New Kingdom of Ancient Egypt.

title: Mentuhotep II becomes pharaoh
fact: Mentuhotep II, also known under his prenomen Nebhepetre, was an ancient Egyptian King, the sixth ruler of the 11th Dynasty.

title: Siptah becomes pharaoh
fact: Akhenre Setepenre Siptah or Merneptah Siptah was the penultimate ruler of the Nineteenth Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Ramesses VI becomes pharaoh
fact: Ramesses VI Nebmaatre-Meryamun was the fifth ruler of the Twentieth Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Unas becomes pharaoh
fact: Unas or Wenis, also spelled Unis, was a king, the ninth and last ruler of the Fifth Dynasty of Egypt during the Old Kingdom.

title: Ramesses XI becomes pharaoh
fact: Menmaatre Ramesses XI reigned from 1106 BC to somewhere between 1078 BC and 1068 BC and is generally considered the tenth and final pharaoh of the Twentieth Dynasty of Egypt and as such, the last king of the New Kingdom period.

title: Psamtik I becomes pharaoh
fact: Wahibre Psamtik I was the first pharaoh of the Twenty-sixth Dynasty of Egypt, the Saite period, ruling from the city of Sais in the Nile delta between 664 and 610 BC.

title: Senusret I becomes pharaoh
fact: Senusret I also anglicized as Sesostris I and Senwosret I was the second king of the 12th Dynasty of Egypt, and was one of the most powerful kings of the dynasty.

title: Amenemhat I becomes pharaoh
fact: Amenemhat I, also known as Amenemhet I, was a pharaoh of ancient Egypt and the first king of the Twelfth Dynasty of the Middle Kingdom.

title: Ramesses V becomes pharaoh
fact: Usermaatre Sekheperenre Ramesses V was the fourth pharaoh of the Twentieth Dynasty of Egypt and was the son of Ramesses IV and Duatentopet.

title: Amenmesse becomes pharaoh
fact: Amenmesse was the fifth pharaoh of the Nineteenth Dynasty in Ancient Egypt, possibly the son of Merneptah and Queen Takhat.

title: Senusret II becomes pharaoh
fact: Senusret II or Sesostris II was the fourth king of the 12th Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Amasis II becomes pharaoh
fact: Amasis II or Ahmose II was a pharaoh of the Twenty-sixth Dynasty of Egypt, the successor of Apries at Sais.

title: Ramesses IX becomes pharaoh
fact: Neferkare Setepenre Ramesses IX or 1129–1111 BC) was the eighth pharaoh of the Twentieth Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Djedefre becomes pharaoh
fact: Djedefre was an ancient Egyptian king (pharaoh) of the 4th Dynasty during the Old Kingdom.

title: Pepi I Meryre becomes pharaoh
fact: Pepi I Meryre was an ancient Egyptian pharaoh, third king of the Sixth Dynasty of Egypt, who ruled for over 40 years at the turn of the 24th and 23rd centuries BC, toward the end of the Old Kingdom period.

title: Sahure becomes pharaoh
fact: Sahure was a pharaoh of ancient Egypt and the second ruler of the Fifth Dynasty.

title: Twosret becomes pharaoh
fact: Tausret, also spelled Tawosret or Twosret was the last known ruler and the final pharaoh of the Nineteenth Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Merneith becomes pharaoh
fact: Merneith was a consort and a regent of Ancient Egypt during the First Dynasty.

title: Amenemhat II becomes pharaoh
fact: Amenemhat II, also known as Amenemhet II was the third king of the 12th Dynasty during the Middle Kingdom of Egypt.

title: Userkaf becomes pharaoh
fact: Userkaf was a pharaoh of ancient Egypt and the founder of the Fifth Dynasty.

title: Ramesses VIII becomes pharaoh
fact: Usermaatre Akhenamun Ramesses VIII or Ramesses Sethherkhepshef Meryamun, the seventh Pharaoh of the Twentieth Dynasty of the New Kingdom of Egypt.

title: Djedkare Isesi becomes pharaoh
fact: Djedkare Isesi was a pharaoh, the eighth and penultimate ruler of the Fifth Dynasty of Egypt in the late 25th century to mid-24th century BC, during the Old Kingdom.

title: Ramesses VII becomes pharaoh
fact: Usermaatre Setepenre Meryamun Ramesses VII was the sixth pharaoh of the 20th Dynasty of Ancient Egypt.

title: Merenre Nemtyemsaf I becomes pharaoh
fact: Merenre Nemtyemsaf was an Ancient Egyptian pharaoh and the fourth king of the Sixth Dynasty.

title: Ramesses X becomes pharaoh
fact: Khepermaatre Ramesses X was the ninth pharaoh of the 20th Dynasty of Ancient Egypt.

title: Amyrtaeus becomes pharaoh
fact: Amyrtaeus of Sais is the only pharaoh of the Twenty-eighth Dynasty of Egypt and is thought to be related to the royal family of the Twenty-sixth Dynasty.

title: Anedjib becomes pharaoh
fact: Anedjib, more correctly Adjib and also known as Hor-Anedjib, Hor-Adjib, Anezib and Azib, is the Horus name of an early Egyptian king who ruled during the 1st Dynasty.

title: Amenemhat IV becomes pharaoh
fact: Amenemhat IV was the seventh and penultimate king of the late Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt during the late Middle Kingdom period.

title: Neferirkare Kakai becomes pharaoh
fact: Neferirkare Kakai was an ancient Egyptian pharaoh, the third king of the Fifth Dynasty.

title: Neferefre becomes pharaoh
fact: Neferefre Isi was an ancient Egyptian pharaoh of the Fifth Dynasty during the Old Kingdom period.

title: Shepseskare Isi becomes pharaoh
fact: Shepseskare or Shepseskara was an Ancient Egyptian king, the fourth or fifth ruler of the Fifth Dynasty during the Old Kingdom period.

title: Teos of Egypt becomes pharaoh
fact: Djedhor, better known as Teos or Tachos, was an ancient Egyptian pharaoh of the 30th Dynasty.

title: Mentuhotep III becomes pharaoh
fact: Sankhkare Mentuhotep III of the 11th Dynasty was King of Egypt during the Middle Kingdom.

title: Hakor becomes pharaoh
fact: Hakor or Hagar, also known by the hellenized forms Achoris or Hakoris, was an ancient Egyptian pharaoh of the 29th Dynasty.

title: Menkauhor Kaiu becomes pharaoh
fact: Menkauhor Kaiu was an Ancient Egyptian pharaoh of the Old Kingdom period.

title: Bakenranef becomes pharaoh
fact: Bakenranef, known by the ancient Greeks as Bocchoris or Bochchoris was briefly a king of the 24th Dynasty of Egypt.

title: Arsinoe III of Egypt becomes pharaoh
fact: Arsinoe III Philopator was Queen of Ptolemaic Egypt in 220 – 204 BC.
